marketplace.targets.description: Multi-target adapter system that exports bundles to alternative AI-assistant formats (currently Claude Code native + OpenCode). Implements TargetBase plus per-target frontmatter mapping and body transforms.

test.description: Top-level Python test tree mirroring marketplace bundle layout (one subdir per bundle). Holds pytest modules that execute marketplace scripts via subprocess + PYTHONPATH and parse their TOON outputs.

purpose_reasoning: Top-level pyproject with Python 3.12 requirement; hosts test entry points executed via pyprojectx (./pw module-tests / verify)
responsibility: Root project module housing the pyprojectx-based test harness for the entire marketplace. Contains the unified pytest suite that exercises every bundle's scripts (plan-marshall, pm-dev-*, pm-documents, pm-plugin-development, pm-requirements) plus the multi-target adapter generator.
